creator: ronald-lists@klop.ws
text:
Your process command line in the dump-info is different then where java/openjdk11 is installed:
/compat/linux/android-studio/jre/bin/java

And the version of your "pkg info openjdk11": 11.0.16 is different then the version in the error: 11.0.10.

I doubt the crash is from java/openjdk11. I think it is an embedded (Linux) java in android-studio.
